checks_performed: Detection: ffprobe materials/source.mp4 showed 1280x720 H.264 video, AAC stereo audio, and 293.083 second duration.
Detection: sampled source frames every 5 seconds and created work/contact/source_5s_sheet.jpg to locate the expert chef segment in the final third.
Detection: sampled 1 fps from 140-235 seconds and 220-285 seconds, confirming the proficient pancake-making sequence and excluding novice bloopers/end card material.
Planning: wrote work/edit_plan.md before final rendering with the five-step tutorial cut plan.
Tool execution: rendered submit/output.mp4 with ffmpeg trim/crop/scale/concat/drawtext/loudnorm/alimiter filters via work/render_tutorial.py.
Final validation: ffprobe submit/output.mp4 reports H.264 720x1280, 9:16 DAR, 23.976 fps, AAC LC stereo 48 kHz, duration 61.726 seconds.
Final validation: sampled output frames at 1 fps and inspected work/contact/output_1s_sheet.jpg for portrait crop, action visibility, captions, plated result, and no black padding.
Final validation: cv2 scan sampled 62 one-second frames; black_like_seconds=[], near_frozen_seconds=[], min_mean=95.39, min_std=42.10.
Final validation: ffmpeg volumedetect on output reported mean_volume=-19.0 dB and max_volume=-0.7 dB.
Final validation: ffmpeg silencedetect at noise=-45dB:d=1.0 reported no silence events in the final output.
